headline: 92 HCA Healthcare Hospitals Earn Healthgrades Patient Safety Excellence Award
summary: NASHVILLE, Tenn., March 10, 2026--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA), one of the nation’s leading healthcare providers, today announced that 92 of its hospitals achieved the 2026 Patient Safety Excellence Award from Healthgrades for their commitment to safe, patient-centered care. This recognition is given to the top 10% of hospitals nationwide for patient safety.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on HCA Healthcare, Lowers Price Target to $561
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Ryan Langston   maintains HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $529 to $561.
